scope: PR #7 feat/rebuild-complete HEAD @ 3fc5afba — repo-wide invariant + drift audit

enforcement.boundaries_entry_point: error (cross-domain barrel-only; intra-domain deep allowed; lib/core+lib/utils exempt)
enforcement.note: issue 092b Stage 3 flipped both warn->error; pnpm lint reports 0 errors per PR body

invariants_checked.name: ui-not-import-db-runtime
invariants_checked.note: no client-component @/lib/core/db imports; greppable guard returns zero

invariants_checked.name: use-client-no-server-barrel-leak
invariants_checked.note: greppable guard (use-client + @/lib/auth barrel) returns zero; the 2026-06-04 operator-smoke regression is fixed

invariants_checked.name: payment-crypto-in-adapters-only
invariants_checked.note: HMAC/verify lives in lib/payment/adapters/{momo,stub}.ts invoked by webhook route; other createHmac hits are auth/otp/holdCookie/storage-signing, not payment

invariants_checked.name: no-ddl-in-app-code
invariants_checked.note: no $executeRaw DDL in app/ or lib/

drift_vs_prior.note: db layer relocated lib/db/** -> lib/core/db/** (issue 091 consolidation); prior snapshot layer_map was stale — corrected here
new domains since PR#6: admin realm, ledger, charter, onboarding/KYB, places, jobs, storage, notification — all under enforced barrel boundaries

drift_vs_prior.subject: recharts adr-missing
drift_vs_prior.note: recharts dep + orphan chart components deleted (issue 041); finding moot

detail.note: no docs/adr/ dir; architecturally-significant choices (custom JWT auth realms, Prisma/Postgres, MoMo payment adapter, custom FeatureFlag store, run-locked cron jobs, signed-URL storage) lack ADRs. rebuild-plan.md + docs/runbook partially substitute as design record.

detail.subject: @/lib/auth
detail.note: imported ~169x (~30% of source files) — under the 70% god-module threshold but the most-imported barrel; monitor.

shape_notes: Boundaries + no-cycle enforced at error — structural integrity is lint-gated, not just convention. 32 lib-domain barrels. No shallow-pile or layer-violation findings at HEAD. Architecture is the strong dimension of this PR.
